title: Sanya, Hainan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sanya, Hainan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sanya is a city in Hainan with a population of 1,031,000. China’s premier tropical beach destination on Hainan Island, known for its luxury resorts, diving spots, and warm year-round climate.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
